testcase.name: PrivateDomain.tsx page structure > has 400+ lines (stub replaced)
PrivateDomain.tsx page structure > implements 4 view modes (flow|config|result|history) via URL state
PrivateDomain.tsx page structure > imports and renders PrivateDomainFlowView
PrivateDomain.tsx page structure > imports and renders PrivateDomainConfigView
PrivateDomain.tsx page structure > imports and renders PrivateDomainResultView
PrivateDomain.tsx page structure > imports and renders PrivateDomainHistoryView
PrivateDomain.tsx page structure > calls trpc.privateDomain.generate.useMutation()
PrivateDomainFlowView 6 阶段卡片 (ui/_1) > renders 6 default phase cards
PrivateDomainFlowView 6 阶段卡片 (ui/_1) > shows phase connectors between cards
PrivateDomainFlowView 6 阶段卡片 (ui/_1) > PhaseCard shows 状态(未生成/已生成)
PrivateDomainFlowView 6 阶段卡片 (ui/_1) > PhaseCard expands to show tactics/scripts/metrics on click
PrivateDomainConfigView 配置表单 (ui/_5) > has productDescription textarea
PrivateDomainConfigView 配置表单 (ui/_5) > has productPrice number input
PrivateDomainConfigView 配置表单 (ui/_5) > has targetAudience textarea
PrivateDomainConfigView 配置表单 (ui/_5) > has ipPositioning textarea
PrivateDomainConfigView 配置表单 (ui/_5) > has currentChannel select with 5 options
PrivateDomainConfigView 配置表单 (ui/_5) > has monthlyTraffic number input
PrivateDomainConfigView 配置表单 (ui/_5) > form validation: submit disabled when fields empty
PrivateDomainResultView 生成结果 (ui/_7) > shows streaming state
PrivateDomainResultView 生成结果 (ui/_7) > has retry and view-history buttons
PrivateDomainResultView 生成结果 (ui/_7) > renders phase connectors between result phases
PrivateDomainHistoryView 历史回看 (ui/_14) > calls trpc.history.list with agentId PrivateDomainAgent
PrivateDomainHistoryView 历史回看 (ui/_14) > has history-table with DenseTable structure
PrivateDomainHistoryView 历史回看 (ui/_14) > has restore-btn to restore view 1-3 state
PrivateDomainHistoryView 历史回看 (ui/_14) > shows empty state when no history
PrivateDomain localStorage draft (AC-7) > draft key includes userId and private_domain_draft
PrivateDomain localStorage draft (AC-7) > uses debounce 1s for draft save
generatePrivateDomainInput schema > validates valid input
generatePrivateDomainInput schema > rejects invalid channel
generatePrivateDomainInput schema > rejects negative price
generatePrivateDomainInput schema > accepts all 5 channel values
privateDomain API router > router accepts new 6-field input schema
privateDomain API router > router writes to History with PrivateDomainAgent
privateDomain API router > router builds 6-phase SOP content
privateDomain API router > router has generateStream SSE subscription (AC-8)
privateDomain API router > generateStream yields phase chunks individually (AC-8 per-phase chunk)
PrivateDomain page SSE streaming (AC-8 frontend) > imports trpcClient for imperative subscription
PrivateDomain page SSE streaming (AC-8 frontend) > calls generateStream.subscribe for SSE streaming
PrivateDomain page SSE streaming (AC-8 frontend) > handles phase chunks from stream (onData)
PrivateDomain page SSE streaming (AC-8 frontend) > unsubscribes on unmount (no memory leak)
